basic_details.job_title: IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu) has released the official Research Assistant Notification 2026 at iimj.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 30 years of age with a Ph.D., Post Graduate, or M.Phil. degree in Economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, IT Engineering, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline with a minimum of 55% marks can apply online on or before 20-08-2026. The official notification PDF and online ap

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D/Post Graduate/M.Phil in or a related discipline from a recognized university with minimum of 55% marks.
qualification.details: Ph.D/Post Graduate/M.Phil in Economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, IT Engineering, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline from a recognized university with a minimum of 55% marks. Proficiency in written & spoken Dogri/Kashmiri/Hindi languages is preferred. Good academic record and strong analytical, research, and report-writing skills. Proficiency in data collection, survey methods, statistical analysis, and use of MS Office/SPSS/R/Stata or similar software.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_jammu_iim: Ph.D/Post Graduate/M.Phil in or a related discipline from a recognized university with minimum of 55% marks.

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Jammu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Jammu Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D/Post Graduate/M.Phil in Economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, IT Engineering, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline from a recognized university with a minimum of 55% marks. Proficiency in written & spoken Dogri/Kashmiri/Hindi languages is preferred. Good academic record and strong analytical, research, and report-writing skills. Proficiency in data collection, survey methods, statistical analysis, and use of MS Office/SPSS/R/Stata or similar software.

rows.event: Last Date to Submit Online Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at IIM Jammu?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Research Assistant post at IIM Jammu is 20th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Ph.D/Post Graduate/M.Phil in specific disciplines like Economics, Management, Commerce, etc., with at least 55% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific information regarding age relaxation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Assistant job at IIM Jammu?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of IIM Jammu on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Assistant position at IIM Jammu.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What are the preferred language proficiencies for this role?
faq.answer: Proficiency in written and spoken Dogri, Kashmiri, and Hindi languages is preferred for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q9. What skills are essential for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Essential skills include strong analytical, research, and report-writing abilities, along with proficiency in data collection, survey methods, statistical analysis, and software like MS Office, SPSS, R, or Stata.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
